requested_by: Dana Reyes, Head of Fraud Analytics
question: Why did CNP fraud spike for tier-2 merchants in Texas last Tuesday?
metric_label: CNP fraud by merchant tier and region, daily

upstream_models.description: Card transactions landed by Fivetran from Visa and Mastercard feeds. Includes channel (CNP/CP), amount, merchant_id, and fraud signals.
Fraud disposition from the AML monitoring vendor. Includes fraud_type, confirmed_fraud flag, and dispute_status.
Merchant master with tier classification (tier-1, tier-2, tier-3), MCC code, and billing_state from Visa/Mastercard reference data.
